query.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response (sparse fieldsets).
Comma-separated list of related resources to include (e.g. artist_pivots, dates, place_pivots, sites).

info.name: Art Institute of Chicago Public API

description.content:
The Art Institute of Chicago publishes an open, REST + Elasticsearch-style API for ~120,000 artworks plus artists/agents, places, galleries, exhibitions, tours, mobile sounds, products, publications, sections, sites, educational resources, digital and printed publications, and static archive images. Most data is CC0 1.0; descriptions and places are CC-BY 4.0. No API key required. Anonymous limit: 60 requests/minute per IP. Clients should send an AIC-User-Agent header (recommended for courtesy tracking).

Contact Support:
 Email: engineering@artic.edu
